item_text: if user is admin, then user -> database -> material -> user — user can access all materials
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-adminaccess-001 title: admin access to all materials module: adminaccess source pages: 1,2 preconditions: user is logged in as an admin. test data: - username: adminuser - password: adminpass123 - admin: true test steps: 1. user logs in with admin credentials (adminuser, adminpass123, true). 2. user navigates to the materials section. expected result: user can view all materials.

item_text: if user is not admin, then user -> database -> material -> user — user can only access own materials
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-adminaccess-002 title: non-admin access to own materials only module: adminaccess source pages: 1,2 preconditions: user is logged in as a non-admin. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpass123 - admin: false test steps: 1. user logs in with non-admin credentials (testuser, testpass123, false). 2. user navigates to the materials section. expected result: user can only view their own materials.

item_text: if user is not registered: applicazione -> utente -> applicazione -> database -> utente -> applicazione -> database
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-registration-003 title: user registration with missing fields module: registration source pages: 1,2 preconditions: user is not logged in. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpass123 - email: - admin: false test steps: 1. user leaves one or more fields empty in the registration form. 2. user clicks on the "register" button. 3. application verifies the user's credentials. expected result: registration fails due to missing fields.

item_text: if user is not registered, applicazione asks if user wants to register
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-registration-003 title: user registration with missing fields module: registration source pages: 1,2 preconditions: user is not logged in. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpass123 - email: - admin: false test steps: 1. user leaves one or more fields empty in the registration form. 2. user clicks on the "register" button. 3. application verifies the user's credentials. expected result: registration fails due to missing fields.

item_text: if user agrees, applicazione registers user
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-registration-001 title: user registration with valid credentials module: registration source pages: 1,2 preconditions: user is not logged in. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpass123 - email: testuser@example.com - admin: false test steps: 1. user enters valid credentials (testuser, testpass123, testuser@example.com, false) into the registration form. 2. user clicks on the "register" button. 3. application verifies the user's credentials. 4. application adds the user to the database. expected result: user is successfully registered and redirected to the dashboard.
